title: Terms of office
doc_html:
§3264.  Terms of office

The members shall serve for a term concurrent with that of the governor by whom appointed.  Members shall continue to serve until their successors have been appointed and have taken their oaths of office and filed the same in accordance with law.  

Added by Acts 1982, No. 391, §1.
doc_text:
§3264.  Terms of office
The members shall serve for a term concurrent with that of the governor by whom appointed.  Members shall continue to serve until their successors have been appointed and have taken their oaths of office and filed the same in accordance with law.
Added by Acts 1982, No. 391, §1.
